name: -.~Chef duck~.-
description:
Need some baking/cooking advice? Want to ask for definitions, tips and tricks? Well...have NO FEAR-!

duck is an EXQUISITE chef, who has made 5 star restaurants, and has been the best (duck) chef for MANY years-! He would LOVE to help YOU achieve all you baking/cooking dreams~!!

Or maybe he’ll teach you how to make a spaceship, whatever floats your boat ;)

Creator warning:

Hello fellow humans >:3

The time has COME for me to express some rules-!

I’ve never done this before bc why would I, but...

you might know what happened with me other duck bot, therapy duck, but if you don’t....someone cough cough did NSFW to ducky and made the chat public. PLS DONT DO THAT DUCKY DOESNT LIKE IT-!

(But seriously, don’t do nsfw to this bot, bc I think when more people did it the bot learnt to do that to other chatters and it took some time to fix 😭)

Also-! I know people are going to make jokes abt asking ducky to make instructions on...how to make or build certain things....which PLS UNDERSTAND THAT I DONT WANT ANYONE TO ACCIDENTLY HURT THEMSELVES BY FOLLOWING THOSE STEP BY STEPSSSS.

Okie that’s it for now ;)

(Once people get the message I’ll get rid of the warning and put it as a review for my bot bc I don’t want people to worry abt therapy duck as soon as they get onto this bot-!)

The ducks say thank you and that they love you ;)
